text:
おう、お疲れ様。
お前との探索は何度やっても
飽きないもんだな。

これからもちょくちょく
付き合ってもらうぞ？

いずれまた別の場所も探索したい。
機会があったら、よろ

Great work out there. I'll tell you, I don't
think I'll ever grow tired of heading out on
expeditions with you.
I hope you don't think we're done for good yet!

There are still other locales I want to
explore, if we get the chance to tackle them
together.
